title: Stam1o Supporter Server S3
description: Modpack used for Season 3 of Stam1o's Supporter Server
body: # **Stam1o Presents:** Stam1o's Supporter Server 3, Create Pack, a Minecraft modpack designed to unleash your creativity, wheter you're a builder, redstoner or casual adventurer. With a strong focus on the Create Mod for Minecraft 1.21.1, this Neoforge-based pack offers the perfect sandbox to bring your wildest ideas to life. Curated by Stam1o and the community, this pack enhances the Create experience with numerous addons. Alongside Create, you'll find a selection of quality of life and building focused mods. For builders, Chipped provides an extensive block palette complimented by an array of decoration mods. With Better Archeology and Yung's Structure mods there are a ton of new structures to explore. With Create and its vast ecosystem, your imagination is the only limit. Construct sprawling factories, intricate train networks, or even a fully functional carousel! Have fun flying through the sky on your very own biplane or airship, or dive underground and find angry chests to give you very cool artifacts! For more information regarding the server join the discord linked below.  ## Main mods are: - Create - A bunch of Addons for Create - Farmers Delight - Better Archeology - Yung's Structures - EMI - Chipped - Fun mods such as artifacts, epic knights and more - Immersive aircraft - Detail Mods such as Amendments, Supplementaries and more - Performance mods ## [![Nodecraft Sponsorship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef67704ea76bfadc1a950915755dcb1b72300e24.jpeg)](https://nodecraft.com/r/stam1o) ## *All mods are the property of their respective owners, massive thank you to them, without them all of this wouldn't be possible! Special thanks to DevongG and ADeadMansSpacesuit for putting the pack together. Also a big thanks to L0rdG1gabyt3 and Winter vessel for helping us with kubejs files and optimization of the pack.
